title: themelium yoderi
intro: Themelium yoderi, also known as Yoder's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to Australia and New Zealand. Themelium yoderi is used in traditional medicine for its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
